name: Endlessly side-scrolling Balloon Simulator 2024
short_description: Embark on a serene hot air balloon journey, but don't get too comfortable! The real-life-inspired physics can present a challenge as you navigate over towers and under clouds in this easy to learn (but hard to master) endless side-scroller. How far will you make it today?
detailed_description:
Embark on a serene hot air balloon journey in this easy-to-learn (but hard-to-master) endless side-scroller!

Flying a hot air balloon seems simple: heat it up with the burner until it lifts off, then let the wind take you where you need to go, right? Why not give it a try? Soon, you’ll discover that heating and cooling a few tons of air, while keeping it just around the edge of neutral buoyancy, is a fickle task. You’ll need to think several hundred meters ahead, making hot air ballooning one of the slowest yet most dramatic experiences you can have!

Control the burner and the venting valve. The higher you go, the stronger the wind pushes you forward. Keep the balloon above ground obstacles and below the clouds for as long as possible. Sounds easy, huh?
